dct_title_s: Map of the Eastern Frontier of the Colony of the Cape of Good Hope
dct_description_sm:
First published in 1836 by John Arrowsmith of London. "This map provides a great deal of
        historical and geographical information regarding the important part of the Cape Colony
        which was the scene of nine frontier wars between the Cape government and the Xhosa tribe."
        Inset shows 'Statistical notes 1833'. Dedicated to Sir Benjamin D'Urban.
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Dr. Oscar I. Norwich collection of maps of Africa and its islands, 1486 - ca. 1865 courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
